text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after her half-hearted scrimmage, Special Week shows up to
training for a practice run.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I'm not done yet! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm not going down without a fight!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As El Condor Pasa and Grass Wonder begin to pick up their pace,
Special Week concedes her space and makes way for the other two to
pass.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She is unmotivated, and it shows in her running. During partner
running, her friends also seem confused seeing such a downtrodden
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right, enough of this! What's going on, Spe?! Out with it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Where's your usual motivation?! Tenacity! Grit! What happened to
you?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El... Um, well... I'm s-sorry...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sigh. You know what? Fine, have it your way! We're done partner running for today.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I can't run with you when you're like this, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: E-El...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Spe... I think I'm going to call it for today too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass... U-um... I'm sorry! I—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Don't be sorry, Spe. Whatever it is, we know it isn't your fault, so
don't go blaming yourself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's just... You seem lost, and running without a sense of direction is
dangerous. Peace of mind, peace in running, yes? You could hurt
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No need to rush, though. Okay, Spe? Take your time calming down.
Facing yourself comes after that.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It just so happens that the person who can best help you is already
here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Um, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Heheh... Now then, I'll take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay... Thanks, Grass.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'm sorry. I just can't find the motivation to run.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass is right... I think I'm lost.
choice_data_list:
What your friend said earlier... Is that what's
bothering you?

What your friend said earlier... Is that what's
bothering you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? How do you know that?
choice_data_list: Sorry, I kinda overheard your conversation.
Sorry, I kinda overheard your conversation.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see... That must have surprised you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I was... also a bit shocked.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've never really been around other Umamusume, and this is my first
time making friends, so... it's also the first time a friend has yelled at
me...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was so surprised. It was like a wave of chills swept over my entire
body.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And ever since then, I've felt... off.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I try to run faster—try to win—that wave of chills comes
back, and my body refuses to listen.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer, what should I do? Will I ever be able to run again?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Am I gonna be like this forever?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I just... I don't... What do I even do?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week crouches down and tightly holds on to her knees, tears
rolling down her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to sit by her side to keep an eye on her until she finally calms
down.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hic... Phew... Sorry again, Trainer. I think I feel better now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The sun's already setting, huh? Y'know... When I first moved here, I
thought the days were super long, but—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Spe! I finally found you... Oh. Um, I'm sorry! Am I interrupting
something?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're fine, Suzuka! Do you need me for anything?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, a letter from your mom arrived at the dorm, so I thought I
should bring it to you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you always get so excited whenever you receive a letter from
your mom, so...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you, Suzuka! You really shouldn't have!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka hands her the letter and swiftly takes her leave. In her
own way, she's also worried about her roommate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the letter now in her hands, Special Week slowly opens the
envelope and reads the letter from top to bottom.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Same ol', same ol'.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... right. my mom's closing line. It's always the same.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
"Spe, my dear. I wish you a life of happiness, forever and always."
She's been telling me the same thing for as long as I can remember.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My mom who raised me... and my Mama gave birth to me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My Mama actually passed away before I could even open my own
eyes. I've only ever seen pictures of her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But her best friend took me in and raised me as her own. She made
me the person I am today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Mom told me that all Mama wished was that I find peace and
happiness—that the entirety of Mama's hopes and dreams lie within
me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Isn't it amazing? I get to have two mothers! And they both
love me more than anything!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: They really are... the best...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...What I am doing?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, if you'll excuse me for a moment... I'd like some time alone to
run around this area.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without another word, Special Week sprints off, and I watch her back
disappear into the distance.
